docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA, LOUISA DBA M & M FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGARY, ERICA $5,310.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,425.00, PARTIES AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING PAYMENT PLAN; DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $250.00 EVERY TWO WEEKS OR $500.00 PER MONTH UNTIL JUDGMENT IS PAID OFF COMPLETELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MENDOZA, LOUISA DBA M & M FINANCIAL SERVICES MCGARY, ERICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-10-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506 PLAINTIFF LOUISA MENDOZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERICA MCGARY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,310.00 FILED BY MENDOZA, LOUISA DBA M & M FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MCGARY, ERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUN-26-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCGARY, ERICA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
